programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E14 - Mountain Gorillas, The Democratic Republic Of The Congo
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters and also from a sneezy Grandmaster Glitch's germs.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E3 - Gloves
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: E8 - The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: E19 - Panama Canal, Panama
programme.desc: Glitch sinks in the Panama Canal and needs saving... again.

programme.title: E22 - Dinosaur
programme.desc: The children want to make a big dinosaur model so they can learn all about it. They make such a huge dinosaur that they want to take it to the museum to be shown as an exhibit.

programme.title: E32 - It's Time To Go Stargazing
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a sleepover. JoJo loves to look at the night sky, so Gran Gran suggests that they go stargazing in the garden. What can they spot in the night sky? Are there more constellations to find?

programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge

programme.title: E36 - The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: Stumbling Stones - Lest We Forget
programme.desc: ‘Stolpersteine', or ‘stumbling stones' placed in the pavement commemorate the victims of Nazism. The squares are made of brass and measure 10cm x 10cm. More than 100,000 of these memorial plaques have been laid in over 30 countries.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E1 - 孫楠歌單隱藏滿滿父愛
programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E12 - 幸福收官創最高牽手率
programme.desc: 以一日為期限，將地點設定為日常生活的三大場景，邀請男女嘉賓在此相聚認識並展開進一步了解；打破戀綜常見的觀察室模式，主理人張純燁將與「助力團」蕭敬騰、大張偉、蒲熠星、蔡國慶、王耀慶面對面見證男女嘉賓們的感情升溫，陪伴他們經歷情感上的甜蜜與失落。

programme.title: E9 - 劉維 吉克雋逸驚喜加盟
programme.desc: 蘇有朋、薛之謙、王嘉爾、周筆暢、胡彥斌、歐陽娜娜等明星作為音浪召集人，他們將與300位合夥人組成3組音浪團，在24小時內緊急排練，一起完成創意十足的音樂SHOW。

programme.title: E8 - Hotel Hubertus, Italy - Christmas Special
programme.desc: In the Alpine Tyrol region of Northern Italy lies Hotel Hubertus - a family run resort which offers spectacular views of the surrounding mountains thanks to its extraordinary architecture. Rob and Monica discover the unique Heaven and Hell spa, local ski experiences and are welcomed into the family behind the vision.

programme.title: E4 - Fish
programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. He is joined by Chef Akmal Anuar, who heads into the Persian Gulf on a deep-sea fishing trip to catch fresh barracuda for his incredible woodfired recipe.

programme.title: E5 - New Passive House With A Timber Structure
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie visit a multi level family home built with a wooden structure. A single stove heats the entire house. Also featured: the Marnay-sur-Seine priory, both an exhibition venue and guesthouse; what to consider about extensions when buying or renovating; building a wood shelter.

programme.title: E8 - Nathalie Lasselin, Diving Guide In France
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: E91

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: My Life as a Superhero
programme.desc: Sprinter is doubtful whether he is a good superhero. Fortunately, he has Leo and Bumble to remind him of all the good things he has done since returning to Bhilka.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Red Deer
programme.desc: Grandad thinks the deer's antlers look very dangerous. Mommy and Daddy Owl are sure that the deer on TV is actually a unicorn. Orla and Meabh refuse to take their medicine, but crafty Fiona Fox isn't about to be outdone by these mischievous hedgehogs.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Baby Badgers
programme.desc: Victor, the polar bear, has a sore paw, and the Junior Vets are checking on Adel, the lion, and his injured tail. Also, we meet some baby badgers that need a check-up, and Johnny and Inel bust a crafty chocolate-stealing squirrel.

programme.title: The Baltic Sea Anomaly
programme.desc: Ant finds a mysterious box. But a swarm of rabidly voracious “things” emerge, chasing him!

programme.title: Bum Noises!
programme.desc: Dr Xand has been recording his farts. But why is it they sound so different? And we meet two of our brilliant new Ouchers!

programme.title: Making the Grade
programme.desc: To qualify for this year's British Championships, Sophie has to pass a difficult technical test. Elites, James and Ekraj, are also aiming for the British Championships, and their coach Karen has called in a surprise mentor to help them nail some tricky new skills.

programme.title: The Big Mystery
programme.desc: Today poor Sprout, the bunny, has painful gnashers, and the Junior Vets are here to help. There is a big mystery at the aquarium – why is Lucy, the sea lion, putting on so much weight? And the punky monkeys need vital nutrition.

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: DiktaThor challenges Sprinter to a duel. Due to the ancient Bhilka rules, Sprinter has to accept the challenge. The duel covers three classic disciplines: work-juice-belting, keep-breath-longest, and soap-bubble-shooting. Who is going to win?

programme.title: Programming and Coding
programme.desc: How did people compute before the invention of computers? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of computing. Have hands-on fun by making your own abacus, and get to know Ada Lovelace, the first computer programmer before the invention of computers.

programme.title: Hitting a Wall
programme.desc: An 'obstacle course day' in gym class forces the group to reunite and work together. Meanwhile, Kelly has been missing from school, and the gang needs to find her to continue on their mission.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Bugged
programme.desc: Robbie buys a bottle of pheromone-based aftershave, hoping it will make him popular with girls at a party he's planning to go to; but the scent makes him popular with the local bug population instead.

programme.title: Programming and Coding
programme.desc: How did people compute before the invention of computers? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of computing. Have hands-on fun by making your own abacus, and get to know Ada Lovelace, the first computer programmer before the invention of computers.

programme.title: Setters
programme.desc: Apurva Chaudhary and his team leak several examination papers and make huge profits out of it. Meanwhile, Aditya Singh and his team of honest officers attempt to catch the criminals.

programme.title: Sabhapathy
programme.desc: Sabhaapathy, a man with a speech impairment, desperately looks for a job to earn a living. One day, his life turns upside down as he ends up with a corrupt politician's suitcase filled with money.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Phool
programme.desc: A young police officer and the daughter of a gangster fall in love at first sight.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

Tumm Se Tumm Tak E270
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas E82
programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: E1 - Kimba's Rise
programme.desc: While the dominant males roam nearby territories, hunting duties fall to the Mwamba pride’s nine strong lionesses. See how they cope with the approach of the rainy season and six growing teenagers with boundless appetites.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E1 - Kimba's Rise
programme.desc: While the dominant males roam nearby territories, hunting duties fall to the Mwamba pride’s nine strong lionesses. See how they cope with the approach of the rainy season and six growing teenagers with boundless appetites.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Knowing that Mak, the middle-aged newspaper editor often misses his late spouse, his beloved children persuade him to date Siu Fung, the singer who lives next door. At this moment, Siu Fung's cousin, Uncle Sam, returns from the states and proposes to marry Siu Fung. One day, dispute happens between Sam and Mak which makes Siu Fung so mad with Mak...

programme.title: La Brassiere
programme.desc: Samantha, the president of a renowned brassiere company, breaks the tradition and hires two guys, Johnny and Wayne, as brassiere designers, and requires them to submit novel design in 3 months. Lena, is discontent with this decision deliberately make things difficult for them, those two newcomers to the brassiere industry thus act like buffoon. The time is coming. Can those two guys really work out the 'Ultimate Bra'?

programme.title: Running Out Of Time 2
programme.desc: The mysterious figure Ken confronts Sang in a hostage situation and challenges him into a game of ransom. Sang is intrigued...

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: Shanghai Grand
programme.desc: The Taiwan military officer, Hsu falls into the enemy's ambush, and floats to the Shanghai shore where he is saved by Ting Lik. Lik teams up with Kueng to try to make a fortune and soon they become famous in Shanghai. The Shanghai tycoon Fung try to eliminate other opponents with the help of Hsu and Lik. Later, Hsu discovers Fung is the mastermind of the ambush that killed all his fellow officials...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. In this episode, the “Humor Research Institute” has invited veteran filmmakers Chan Hing Kai, Ho Miu Ki and Jack Ng to talk about their comedy-creating experience and introduce how fascinating comedies are written.

programme.title: The Earthquake Detectives
programme.desc: Earthquakes kill thousands of people each year. Now, scientists are searching for clues to when the next big one will strike and a team in China believes they are agonisingly close to a breakthrough.

programme.title: E2 - Designing The Final Act (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Why rehearse your death? Inside the mock coffins and drone burials redesigning our final act. FOR YOUTUBE: From living funerals in Taiwan to well-dying' coffin practice in South Korea - and even drone burials - these innovators are helping people face death to reclaim life.

programme.desc: Actor Kim Tae-ri and Choi Hyun-wook turns into a drama club teacher at a rural elementary school. Together with the students, they will bring a heart-warming drama performance to viewers.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one's memory.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.
